r28.enforcement_class: COMPUTED (reporting-hard — cannot block broker orders and does not pretend to)

ceiling.message: deployed $0 = 0.0% of the Risk-on / Trending ceiling 90% ($87,750 headroom: $87,750)

cash_floor.message: cash $97,500 = 100.0% vs the Risk-on / Trending-implied floor 10% — the ceiling's complement, not a separate limit

evaluations.text: Weekly Sunday review (regime + themes). Do not skip.
evaluations.message: Not Sunday. Next review on Sunday.

evaluations.text: Risk-off regime -> no new aggressive positions.
evaluations.message: Regime is Risk-on / Trending. Rule not triggered.

evaluations.text: New theme entry requires #1/#2 rank for 2 consecutive Sundays AND risk-on regime AND discretionary catalyst review.
evaluations.message: No new entry signals.

evaluations.text: Theme exits when below #3 for 3 consecutive Sundays OR regime degrades to Caution/Risk-off.
evaluations.message: Exit warnings: Semis (Warning — 2/3 weeks below #3).

evaluations.text: Maximum 2 themes active. Cash is the default.
evaluations.message: Superseded → R28 per-group caps: ≤20% / ≤3 positions per GICS group (computed, Layer 3). Concentration is enforced in dollars, not theme counts (D-007).

evaluations.text: Define invalidation before entry. Written down. Close-based.
evaluations.message: No active positions. Define invalidation before entry. Written down. Close-based.

evaluations.text: Size from risk-to-stop, not gut, not conviction, not max premium.
evaluations.message: No active positions. Size from risk-to-stop, not gut, not conviction, not max premium.

evaluations.text: No naked momentum exposure through binary catalysts.
evaluations.message: No active positions. No naked momentum exposure through binary catalysts.

evaluations.text: Verify compliance scope before entering any new instrument class.
evaluations.message: Verify compliance scope before entering any new instrument class.

evaluations.text: Stop moves UP only. Never lower a stop in adversity.
evaluations.message: No active positions. Stop moves UP only. Never lower a stop in adversity.

evaluations.text: Decisions on the exit-timeframe CLOSE, never on intraday wicks.
evaluations.message: No active positions. Decisions on the exit-timeframe CLOSE, never on intraday wicks.

evaluations.text: Exit timeframe must be slower than entry timeframe.
evaluations.message: No active positions. Exit timeframe must be slower than entry timeframe.

evaluations.text: Never override a fired stop.
evaluations.message: No active positions. Never override a fired stop.

evaluations.text: Bank big winners back to preservation core where tax-efficient.
evaluations.message: Bank big winners back to preservation core where tax-efficient.

evaluations.text: Maximum single-position size: 5-8% of relevant account's capital.
evaluations.message: No active positions. Maximum single-position size: 5-8% of relevant account's capital.

evaluations.text: Maximum single-theme exposure: 15% of total book.
evaluations.message: Maximum single-theme exposure: 15% of total book.

evaluations.text: Maximum total theme exposure (across all active themes): 25% of total book.
evaluations.message: Maximum total theme exposure (across all active themes): 25% of total book.

evaluations.text: Minimum cash reserve at all times: 30-40% in money market vehicles.
evaluations.message: Minimum cash reserve at all times: 30-40% in money market vehicles.

evaluations.text: Aggressive sleeve cost basis capped at active theme limits.
evaluations.message: No active positions. Aggressive sleeve cost basis capped at active theme limits.

evaluations.text: Never fund the aggressive sleeve from preservation core. Never cross-fund between accounts.
evaluations.message: Never fund the aggressive sleeve from preservation core. Never cross-fund between accounts.

evaluations.text: No new entries on same day as stop-out from related name.
evaluations.message: No active positions. No new entries on same day as stop-out from related name.

evaluations.text: Hot tape => deploy slowly.
evaluations.message: Hot tape => deploy slowly.

evaluations.text: Conviction expresses through stop placement, not oversizing.
evaluations.message: No active positions. Conviction expresses through stop placement, not oversizing.

evaluations.text: Hitting target = sell signal. No goalpost-moving.
evaluations.message: No active positions. Hitting target = sell signal. No goalpost-moving.

evaluations.text: Don't add to position because it's working. Add only on pullbacks per pre-committed plan.
evaluations.message: No active positions. Don't add to position because it's working. Add only on pullbacks per pre-committed plan.

evaluations.text: No margin leverage on aggressive options trades.
evaluations.message: No margin leverage on aggressive options trades.

evaluations.text: Flexibility means switching themes by rules, not by feel.
evaluations.message: Flexibility means switching themes by rules, not by feel.

standing_rules_text.R12: Exit timeframe must be slower than entry timeframe.
standing_rules_text.R14: Bank big winners back to preservation core where tax-efficient.
standing_rules_text.R15: Maximum single-position size: 5-8% of relevant account's capital.
standing_rules_text.R16: Maximum single-theme exposure: 15% of total book.
standing_rules_text.R17: Maximum total theme exposure (across all active themes): 25% of total book.
standing_rules_text.R18: Minimum cash reserve at all times: 30-40% in money market vehicles.
standing_rules_text.R19: Aggressive sleeve cost basis capped at active theme limits.
standing_rules_text.R20: Never fund the aggressive sleeve from preservation core. Never cross-fund between accounts.
standing_rules_text.R21: No new entries on same day as stop-out from related name.
standing_rules_text.R23: Conviction expresses through stop placement, not oversizing.
standing_rules_text.R24: Hitting target = sell signal. No goalpost-moving.
standing_rules_text.R25: Don't add to position because it's working. Add only on pullbacks per pre-committed plan.
standing_rules_text.R26: No margin leverage on aggressive options trades.
standing_rules_text.R27: Flexibility means switching themes by rules, not by feel.
